title: AI Rules Configuration
description: Schema for ai-rulez YAML configuration files

$schema.description: Reference to this schema for editor support

description.description: A brief description of the project

extends.description: Path or URL to a base configuration to inherit from (local path or remote HTTP/HTTPS URL)

includes.description: List of other ai_rules files to include (local paths or remote URLs)

items.description: Path to another ai_rules YAML file (relative to this file) or HTTP/HTTPS URL

anyOf.description: Remote HTTP/HTTPS URL to an ai_rules YAML file
Local file path (relative or absolute) to an ai_rules YAML file

gitignore.description: Whether to automatically update .gitignore with generated files (defaults to true)

path.description: Output path - can be a file or directory. If directory (ends with /), generates multiple files based on content

type.description: Type of content to generate (defaults to rule)

naming_scheme.description: Naming pattern for files when path is a directory. Variables: {name}, {type}, {index}. Default: '{name}.md' for agents, '{name}.md' for rules

type.description: Template type: builtin (built-in template), file (external file), inline (inline template string)

value.description: Template value: template name for builtin, file path for file, template content for inline

presets.description: List of predefined output configurations to generate

items.description: Name of the preset to use

rules.description: List of rules for AI assistants

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the rule (used for overriding in local files)

priority.description: Rule priority (critical=10, high=8, medium=5, low=3, minimal=1, default: medium)

targets.description: Target patterns for this rule. Empty means applies to all outputs. Supports glob patterns like *.md, docs/*, CLAUDE.md

sections.description: List of informative text sections (rendered as-is)

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the section (used for overriding in local files)

priority.description: Section priority (critical=10, high=8, medium=5, low=3, minimal=1, default: medium)

targets.description: Target patterns for this section. Empty means applies to all outputs. Supports glob patterns like *.md, docs/*, CLAUDE.md

agents.description: List of AI sub-agents to generate

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the agent (used for overriding in local files)

priority.description: Agent priority (critical=10, high=8, medium=5, low=3, minimal=1, default: medium)

tools.description: List of tools available to this agent (omit for all tools)

model.description: Optional model identifier for this agent (e.g., 'claude-3-opus-20240229', 'gpt-4'). If not specified, uses the default model.

type.description: Template type: builtin (built-in template), file (external file), inline (inline template string)

value.description: Template value: template name for builtin, file path for file, template content for inline

template.description: Template configuration for agent system prompt generation

system_prompt.description: Agent system prompt (used when template is not specified)

targets.description: Target patterns for this agent. Empty means applies to all outputs. Supports glob patterns like *.md, docs/*, CLAUDE.md

mcp_servers.description: List of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for tool integration

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the MCP server (used for overriding in local files)

description.description: Optional description of the MCP server capabilities

command.description: Command to start the MCP server (e.g., 'npx', 'python', 'node')

args.description: Command line arguments for the MCP server

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server

transport.description: Transport protocol for MCP server communication (default: stdio)

url.description: URL for remote MCP servers (when transport is sse or http)

enabled.description: Whether this MCP server is enabled (default: true)

targets.description: Target patterns for this MCP server. Empty means applies to all outputs. Supports glob patterns like *.md, docs/*, CLAUDE.md

commands.description: List of custom slash commands for AI assistant interaction

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the command (used for overriding in local files)

description.description: Description of what the command does

system_prompt.description: System prompt or instructions for the AI when this command is used

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut for the command (if supported by the AI tool)

enabled.description: Whether this command is enabled (default: true)

targets.description: Target patterns for this command. Empty means applies to all outputs. Supports glob patterns like *.md, docs/*, CLAUDE.md

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code for quality and best practices
agents.system_prompt: You are a code quality specialist...

commands.name: newtask
commands.description: Start a new task with fresh context
commands.system_prompt: You are starting a new focused task. Ignore previous context and focus only on the new task description.

commands.name: smol
commands.description: Condense the current chat history to reduce token usage
commands.system_prompt: Summarize the conversation history concisely while preserving key context and decisions.
